text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru has been<n>weighed down with
fatigue, so I<n>decide to take her to the infirmary to
rest.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Pshhh! Leave this to me! Resting is<n>one of my best
talents, second only to<n>divination!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it is! Anyway, good night!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh? Where am I?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This feels so mystical... It can only be<n>the work of
Shiraoki! What do you<n>request of me, my great?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Something fell just now!<n>What's this?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whoa! It's a daruma doll!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That brings back memories... The<n>great Shiraoki
offered me one of<n>these in a dream.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to that gift, I didn't give up<n>after that track
and field event, even<n>though I got last place...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And even though it hurt when my<n>sister won... that
doll made it hurt just<n>a little less! Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I was such a crybaby back then...<n>Now I stay
positive and keep on<n>running.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Just like Shiraoki said! "The more you<n>run, the
more possibilities will come<n>upon you."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that dream just now brought<n>back some
good memories. This is<n>definitely a sign of good
luck to come!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yippee! I'm full of energy! O Shiraoki,<n>I still have a
ton more races left in me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Isn't this the test I failed the other<n>day?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The results were so tragic that I<n>offered them up in
a secret burning<n>ritual... So why is it here?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You disappointing scrap of paper! To<n>the afterlife
with you! Go on, shoo!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ack!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... What a terriblenightmare...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Unable to shake off what she saw in<n>her dream,
Matikanefukukitaru does<n>not get much rest.
